# Zhen Subnet
> Bittensor subnet for competitive building energy simulation calibration

## What it does
Miners calibrate simplified building energy models (RC thermal networks) against complex BOPTEST emulator outputs. Validators verify calibration accuracy on held-out data using ASHRAE metrics (CVRMSE, NMBE, R-squared).

## Key concepts
- Two-model architecture: complex emulator (ground truth) + simplified model (calibration target)
- Scoring: CVRMSE 50%, NMBE 25%, R-squared 15%, convergence efficiency 10%
- Deterministic verification: all validators produce identical scores
- Miner-local simulation: miners run all simulations on their own hardware
